understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate the player to the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding spikes and utilizing clicks to remove obstacles effectively.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is primarily horizontal using MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT, which then triggers automatic vertical movement due to gravity until a solid ground or hazard is encountered. Click actions remove clickable tiles (e.g., breakable blocks) to alter paths, and UNDO can revert the previous action to correct mistakes.
